release_summary: PC-side stack-completion calibration (BBM7 + Puppy + BigDog). Symmetric to v2.1.9's QB fix: stack-mate PCs (WR/TE on user's QB team) now have a muted reach penalty (target_reach_per_pick_pc_stack=-3 vs -6 default) so the stack signal can compete with CLV when the PC is past ADP. Example: at the Wilson/Meyers decision, Meyers (JAX bring-back for TLAW user) now correctly ranks above Wilson despite being 14 picks past ADP. Cross-validated: BBM7 Δlog_u=-0.002 (t=-0.97), Puppy Δlog_u=-0.003 (t=-1.07), BigDog Δlog_u=+0.0025 (t=+1.06) — all three pass EV gates; BigDog actually improves on tail prize (+$7.8K).
